---
title: "Adding the DV"
author: "Jonathan Kellogg"
date: "2026-03-09"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(lubridate)
library(data.table)
library(readr)
library(readODS)
library(manifestoR)
```

## Split government

```{r}
df <- read.csv("data/df.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

if (!("president_party" %in% names(df)) || !("parliament_majority" %in% names(df))) {
  df <- df %>%
    mutate(
      president_party = case_when(
        country == "France" & year >= 1947 & year < 1954 ~ "Socialist",
        country == "France" & year >= 1954 & year < 1959 ~ "Centre-Right",
        country == "France" & year >= 1959 & year < 1974 ~ "Gaullist",
        country == "France" & year >= 1974 & year < 1981 ~ "Centre-Right",
        country == "France" & year >= 1981 & year < 1995 ~ "Socialist",
        country == "France" & year >= 1995 & year < 2007 ~ "Gaullist",
        country == "France" & year >= 2007 & year < 2012 ~ "Centre-Right",
        country == "France" & year >= 2012 & year < 2017 ~ "Socialist",
        country == "France" & year >= 2017 & year <= 2026 ~ "Centrist",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      ),
      parliament_majority = case_when(
        country == "France" & year >= 1958 & year < 1968 ~ "Gaullist",
        country == "France" & year >= 1968 & year < 1981 ~ "Centre-Right",
        country == "France" & year >= 1981 & year < 1986 ~ "Socialist",
        country == "France" & year >= 1986 & year < 1988 ~ "Right",
        country == "France" & year >= 1988 & year < 1993 ~ "Socialist",
        country == "France" & year >= 1993 & year < 1997 ~ "Right",
        country == "France" & year >= 1997 & year < 2002 ~ "Socialist",
        country == "France" & year >= 2002 & year < 2012 ~ "Centre-Right",
        country == "France" & year >= 2012 & year < 2017 ~ "Socialist",
        country == "France" & year >= 2017 & year < 2024 ~ "Centrist",
        country == "France" & year >= 2024 & year <= 2026 ~ "Hung",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      )
    )
}

df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    president_party = case_when(
      country == "France" & president_party %in% c("Gaullist", "Centre-Right") ~ "Right",
      TRUE ~ president_party
    ),
    parliament_majority = case_when(
      country == "France" & parliament_majority %in% c("Gaullist", "Centre-Right") ~ "Right",
      TRUE ~ parliament_majority
    ),
    split_government = case_when(
      country == "France" & parliament_majority != "Hung" & president_party == parliament_majority ~ 0,
      country == "France" ~ 1,
      country == "USA" & house == senate & senate == president_party ~ 0,
      country == "USA" ~ 1,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )
  )
```



## Salience

```{r}
mip_data <- read.csv("data/mip_data.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

api_key <- Sys.getenv("MANIFESTO_API_KEY")
if (api_key == "") stop("Set MANIFESTO_API_KEY in your environment.")

mp_setapikey(key = api_key)

countries_keep <- c("Germany", "Italy", "Spain", "Netherlands", "France")

cmp_raw <- mp_maindataset(version = "current") %>%
  filter(countryname %in% countries_keep) %>%
  separate(edate, into = c("year", "month", "day"), convert = TRUE, remove = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(
    role_state    = per401 + per402 + per403 + per404 + per412 + per413,
    social        = per505 + per504,
    labor         = per702 + per701,
    taxation      = per414 + per409,
    agriculture   = per410 + per416,
    multicultural = per608 + per607 + per705,
    energy        = per411 + per501,
    peace         = per104 + per105 + per106,
    criminal      = per603 + per604,
    justice       = per605 + per202,
    eu            = per110 + per108,
    protection    = per407 + per406,
    trade         = per109 + per107,
    defense       = per601 + per602,
    centralize    = per302 + per301
  )

country_year_salience <- cmp_raw %>%
  group_by(countryname, year) %>%
  summarise(
    role_state    = weighted.mean(role_state, pervote, na.rm = TRUE),
    social        = weighted.mean(social, pervote, na.rm = TRUE),
    labor         = weighted.mean(labor, pervote, na.rm = TRUE),
    taxation      = weighted.mean(taxation, pervote, na.rm = TRUE),
    agriculture   = weighted.mean(agriculture, pervote, na.rm = TRUE),
    multicultural = weighted.mean(multicultural, pervote, na.rm = TRUE),
    energy        = weighted.mean(energy, pervote, na.rm = TRUE),
    peace         = weighted.mean(peace, pervote, na.rm = TRUE),
    criminal      = weighted.mean(criminal, pervote, na.rm = TRUE),
    justice       = weighted.mean(justice, pervote, na.rm = TRUE),
    eu            = weighted.mean(eu, pervote, na.rm = TRUE),
    protection    = weighted.mean(protection, pervote, na.rm = TRUE),
    trade         = weighted.mean(trade, pervote, na.rm = TRUE),
    defense       = weighted.mean(defense, pervote, na.rm = TRUE),
    centralize    = weighted.mean(centralize, pervote, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  rename(country = countryname)

mip_clean <- mip_data %>%
  filter(!problemname %in% c("Don't Know/Refused", "None", "Other and All")) %>%
  mutate(topic = case_when(
    problemname == "Economy"                          ~ "technology",
    problemname == "Fiscal Policy"                    ~ "taxation",
    problemname == "International Economic Relations" ~ "trade",
    problemname == "Foreign Policy"                   ~ "trade",
    problemname == "Environment"                      ~ "energy",
    problemname == "Public Safety"                    ~ "criminal",
    problemname == "Rights"                           ~ "justice",
    problemname == "Social Policy"                    ~ "social",
    problemname == "Groups"                           ~ "social",
    problemname == "Morality"                         ~ "criminal",
    problemname == "Youth Issues"                     ~ "education",
    problemname == "Politics"                         ~ "role_state",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )) %>%
  filter(!is.na(topic)) %>%
  group_by(year, topic) %>%
  summarise(salience = mean(perc, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(country = "USA")

pop_weights <- tibble::tibble(
  country = c("Germany", "Italy", "Spain", "Netherlands"),
  population = c(84.4, 58.9, 47.5, 17.8)
)

eu_salience <- country_year_salience %>%
  filter(country %in% pop_weights$country) %>%
  left_join(pop_weights, by = "country") %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -c(country, year, population), names_to = "topic", values_to = "salience") %>%
  group_by(year, topic) %>%
  summarise(salience = weighted.mean(salience, population, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(country = "EU")

salience_full <- bind_rows(
  country_year_salience %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = -c(country, year), names_to = "topic", values_to = "salience"),
  mip_clean %>% select(country, year, topic, salience),
  eu_salience
) %>%
  mutate(
    topic = tolower(topic),
    country = as.character(country)
  )

df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    country = case_when(
      str_to_lower(country) %in% c("usa", "us", "united states") ~ "USA",
      str_to_lower(country) == "france" ~ "France",
      str_to_lower(country) %in% c("eu", "european union") ~ "EU",
      TRUE ~ country
    ),
    year = case_when(
      country == "USA" ~ 1789 + 2 * (as.numeric(congress) - 1),
      country == "France" ~ year(as.Date(texte_date_signature)),
      country == "EU" ~ year(as.Date(Date_document)),
      TRUE ~ as.numeric(year)
    )
  )

setDT(df)
setDT(salience_full)
setkey(salience_full, country, year, topic)

df[, section_salience := salience_full[.(country, year, tolower(section_label)), salience]]
df[, title_salience := salience_full[.(country, year, tolower(title_label)), salience]]

df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    section_topic = tolower(section_label),
    title_topic   = tolower(title_label),
    section_broad = case_when(
      section_topic %in% c("healthcare", "education", "housing", "social", "labor") ~ "social",
      section_topic %in% c("taxation", "finance", "technology", "transportation", "agriculture") ~ "economic",
      section_topic %in% c("criminal", "defense") ~ "security",
      section_topic %in% c("immigration", "trade") ~ "international",
      section_topic %in% c("environment", "energy") ~ "environment",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    title_broad = case_when(
      title_topic %in% c("healthcare", "education", "housing", "social", "labor") ~ "social",
      title_topic %in% c("taxation", "finance", "technology", "transportation", "agriculture") ~ "economic",
      title_topic %in% c("criminal", "defense") ~ "security",
      title_topic %in% c("immigration", "trade") ~ "international",
      title_topic %in% c("environment", "energy") ~ "environment",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )

salience_broad <- salience_full %>%
  mutate(
    topic = case_when(
      topic %in% c("social", "labor", "healthcare", "education", "housing") ~ "social",
      topic %in% c("taxation", "finance", "technology", "transportation", "agriculture") ~ "economic",
      topic %in% c("criminal", "defense") ~ "security",
      topic %in% c("trade", "international", "immigration") ~ "international",
      topic %in% c("environment", "energy") ~ "environment",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(topic)) %>%
  group_by(country, year, topic) %>%
  summarise(salience = mean(salience, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

setDT(salience_broad)
setkey(salience_broad, country, year, topic)

df[, section_salience_broad := salience_broad[.(country, year, section_broad), salience]]
df[, title_salience_broad := salience_broad[.(country, year, title_broad), salience]]

```




## Lobbying power

# US
```{r}
path <- "data/us_lobby/"

us_lobby_combined <- bind_rows(
  read_csv(file.path(path, "Sector Totals, 1995-1996.csv")) %>% mutate(year = 1996),
  read_csv(file.path(path, "Sector Totals, 1997-1998.csv")) %>% mutate(year = 1998),
  read_csv(file.path(path, "Sector Totals, 1999-2000.csv")) %>% mutate(year = 2000),
  read_csv(file.path(path, "Sector Totals, 2001-2002.csv")) %>% mutate(year = 2002),
  read_csv(file.path(path, "Sector Totals, 2003-2004.csv")) %>% mutate(year = 2004),
  read_csv(file.path(path, "Sector Totals, 2005-2006.csv")) %>% mutate(year = 2006),
  read_csv(file.path(path, "Sector Totals, 2007-2008.csv")) %>% mutate(year = 2008),
  read_csv(file.path(path, "Sector Totals, 2009-2010.csv")) %>% mutate(year = 2010),
  read_csv(file.path(path, "Sector Totals, 2011-2012.csv")) %>% mutate(year = 2012),
  read_csv(file.path(path, "Sector Totals, 2013-2014.csv")) %>% mutate(year = 2014),
  read_csv(file.path(path, "Sector Totals, 2015-2016.csv")) %>% mutate(year = 2016),
  read_csv(file.path(path, "Sector Totals, 2017-2018.csv")) %>% mutate(year = 2018),
  read_csv(file.path(path, "Sector Totals, 2019-2020.csv")) %>% mutate(year = 2020),
  read_csv(file.path(path, "Sector Totals, 2021-2022.csv")) %>% mutate(year = 2022)
)

write_csv(us_lobby_combined, "data/US_Lobby_Sector_Totals_Combined.csv")

map_lobby_topic <- function(x, broad = FALSE) {
  x <- str_to_lower(trimws(coalesce(as.character(x), "")))
  default_value <- if (broad) "none" else NA_character_

  case_when(
    str_detect(x, "finance|insur|realest") ~ "finance",
    str_detect(x, "health") ~ "healthcare",
    str_detect(x, "communic|electronic|tech") ~ "technology",
    str_detect(x, "labor") ~ "labor",
    str_detect(x, "agribusiness|agricultur") ~ "agriculture",
    str_detect(x, "energy|nat resource") ~ "energy",
    str_detect(x, "transport") ~ "transportation",
    str_detect(x, "defense") ~ "defense",

    broad & str_detect(x, "lawyer|lobby") ~ "justice",
    broad & str_detect(x, "construction") ~ "housing",
    broad & str_detect(x, "misc business") ~ "trade",
    broad & str_detect(x, "ideology|single-issue") ~ "social",
    broad & str_detect(x, "other") ~ "none",

    TRUE ~ default_value
  )
}

df <- read.csv("data/df_clean.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(
    year = as.integer(year),
    year_lag = year - 1,
    section_topic = str_to_lower(trimws(as.character(section_topic))),
    country = as.character(country)
  )

us_lobby_combined <- us_lobby_combined %>%
  mutate(
    year = as.integer(year),
    Sector = str_to_lower(trimws(as.character(Sector))),
    lobby_topic_strict = map_lobby_topic(Sector, broad = FALSE),
    lobby_topic_broad = map_lobby_topic(Sector, broad = TRUE)
  )

df_usa <- df %>% filter(country == "USA")
df_other <- df %>% filter(country != "USA")

df_usa_joined <- df_usa %>%
  left_join(
    us_lobby_combined,
    by = c("section_topic" = "lobby_topic_broad", "year_lag" = "year")
  )

df_final <- bind_rows(df_usa_joined, df_other)

```


# EU

```{r}
EU_lobby <- read_ods("data/EU_lobby.ods")

EU_lobby_avg <- EU_lobby %>%
  mutate(
    sector_raw = str_to_lower(trimws(as.character(Sector))),
    sector_std = case_when(
      sector_raw == "big tech" ~ "technology",
      sector_raw %in% c("banking & finance", "insurance") ~ "finance",
      sector_raw == "energy" ~ "energy",
      sector_raw == "chemicals & agribusiness" ~ "agriculture",
      sector_raw == "pharma" ~ "healthcare",
      sector_raw == "manufacturing" ~ "trade",
      sector_raw == "automobiles" ~ "transportation",
      sector_raw == "transport & logistics" ~ "transportation",
      sector_raw == "defence & security" ~ "defense",
      sector_raw == "food" ~ "agriculture",
      sector_raw == "metals and mining" ~ "energy",
      sector_raw == "services" ~ "trade",
      sector_raw %in% c("cross-sector", "tobacco") ~ "none",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    lobby_avg = rowMeans(
      select(., `Lobby budget 08-02-2025`, `Lobby budget 08-02-2024`, `Lobby budget 08-02-2020`),
      na.rm = TRUE
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(sector_std), sector_raw != "sum") %>%
  select(sector_std, lobby_avg)

df_eu <- df_final %>%
  filter(country == "EU") %>%
  mutate(section_topic = str_to_lower(trimws(as.character(section_topic))))

df_other <- df_final %>%
  filter(country != "EU")

df_eu_joined <- df_eu %>%
  left_join(EU_lobby_avg, by = c("section_topic" = "sector_std"))

df_final_merged <- bind_rows(df_eu_joined, df_other)

write.csv(df_final_merged, file = "data/df_final_merged.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```
